name: Urban Air Quality Field Campaign — Summer 2026
description: A six-week field deployment across three US cities instrumenting low-cost sensor networks for hyperlocal air quality monitoring. Participants gain hands-on experience with sensor calibration, data pipeline engineering, and environmental policy communication. Results feed into the EPA Community Air Monitoring Database. Past participants have secured Green Horizons funding.
location: Chicago, IL / Houston, TX / Oakland, CA

mentors.name: Dr. Amara Osei
mentors.expertise: Low-cost sensor calibration and environmental data science

mentors.name: Prof. Lin Wei
mentors.expertise: Urban air quality modeling and environmental justice
